sentences.text_original: 你最近看起来有点累，怎么了？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuìjìn kàn qǐlái yǒu diǎn lèi, zěnme le?
sentences.text_translation: Yaqinda biroz charchagan ko'rinasan, nima bo'ldi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты в последнее время выглядишь немного уставшим, что случилось?
sentences.text_translation_en: You've looked a bit tired lately — what's wrong?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 最近工作压力太大了，经常加班到很晚。
sentences.pinyin: Zuìjìn gōngzuò yālì tài dà le, jīngcháng jiābān dào hěn wǎn.
sentences.text_translation: Yaqinda ishdagi bosim juda kuchli, tez-tez kechgacha qo'shimcha ishlayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В последнее время на работе слишком большое давление, часто задерживаюсь допоздна.
sentences.text_translation_en: Work has been really stressful lately — I often work overtime until late.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation: Har kuni soat nechada ishdan chiqasan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Во сколько ты каждый день уходишь с работы?
sentences.text_translation_en: What time do you finish work every day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 正常情况下六点，但这周都到八九点。
sentences.pinyin: Zhèngcháng qíngkuàng xià liù diǎn, dàn zhè zhōu dōu dào bā jiǔ diǎn.
sentences.text_translation: Oddiy holatda oltida, lekin bu hafta sakkiz-to'qqizgacha qoldim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В обычной ситуации в шесть, но на этой неделе — до восьми-девяти.
sentences.text_translation_en: Normally at six, but this week it's been eight or nine.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那太辛苦了！你有没有想过休息一下？
sentences.pinyin: Nà tài xīnkǔ le! Nǐ yǒu méiyǒu xiǎng guo xiūxi yí xià?
sentences.text_translation: Juda mashaqqatli ekan! Biroz dam olishni o'ylab ko'rganmiding?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это очень тяжело! Ты не думал немного отдохнуть?
sentences.text_translation_en: That's exhausting! Have you thought about taking a break?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我也知道应该休息，但是工作做不完，心里着急。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě zhīdào yīnggāi xiūxi, dànshì gōngzuò zuò bù wán, xīnli zháojí.
sentences.text_translation: Dam olish kerakligini bilaman, lekin ish tugamaydi, ko'nglim xavotirda.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я и сам знаю, что нужно отдохнуть, но работа не кончается, и я нервничаю.
sentences.text_translation_en: I know I should rest, but the work never ends, and I get anxious.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我理解，但是身体比工作重要。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ lǐjiě, dànshì shēntǐ bǐ gōngzuò zhòngyào.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я понимаю, но здоровье важнее работы.
sentences.text_translation_en: I understand, but your health is more important than work.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 你说得对。我最近睡眠也不好，经常睡不踏实。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì. Wǒ zuìjìn shuìmián yě bù hǎo, jīngcháng shuì bù tāshi.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri aytasan. Yaqinda uyqum ham yomon, tez-tez tinch uxlayolmayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты прав. В последнее время и сон плохой, часто сплю беспокойно.
sentences.text_translation_en: You're right. My sleep has been bad lately too — I often don't sleep soundly.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你试过运动或者听音乐放松吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shì guo yùndòng huòzhě tīng yīnyuè fàngsōng ma?
sentences.text_translation: Sport bilan shug'ullanib yoki musiqa tinglab dam olishni sinab ko'rganmisan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты пробовал расслабляться спортом или музыкой?
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you tried exercising or listening to music to relax?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 试过，但是很难坚持。工作一忙就忘了。
sentences.pinyin: Shì guo, dànshì hěn nán jiānchí. Gōngzuò yì máng jiù wàng le.
sentences.text_translation: Sinaganman, lekin davom ettirish qiyin. Ish ko'payishi bilanoq unutib qo'yaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Пробовал, но трудно придерживаться. Как только закручусь на работе — сразу забываю.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have, but it's hard to keep it up. As soon as work gets busy, I forget.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我建议你每天给自己留半小时，什么都不想，就休息。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ jiànyì nǐ měitiān gěi zìjǐ liú bàn xiǎoshí, shénme dōu bù xiǎng, jiù xiūxi.
sentences.text_translation: Senga maslahatim: har kuni o'zingga yarim soat ajrat, hech narsa o'ylamasdan shunchaki dam ol.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Советую тебе каждый день оставлять себе полчаса: ни о чём не думать, просто отдыхать.
sentences.text_translation_en: I suggest you set aside half an hour for yourself every day — think about nothing, just rest.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 这个建议不错，我试试看。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè ge jiànyì búcuò, wǒ shì shi kàn.
sentences.text_translation: Bu maslahat yaxshi ekan, sinab ko'raman.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's a good suggestion, I'll give it a try.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 周末也可以出去走走，换换心情。
sentences.pinyin: Zhōumò yě kěyǐ chūqù zǒu zǒu, huàn huan xīnqíng.
sentences.text_translation: Dam olish kunlari ham tashqariga chiqib aylanib, kayfiyatingni o'zgartirsang bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: На выходных тоже можно выйти прогуляться, сменить настроение.
sentences.text_translation_en: On weekends you can also go out for a walk and change your mood.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好。这周末我打算去公园散步，不加班了。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo. Zhè zhōumò wǒ dǎsuàn qù gōngyuán sànbù, bù jiābān le.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi. Shu dam olish kuni bog'da sayr qilmoqchiman, qo'shimcha ishlamayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо. В эти выходные я собираюсь погулять в парке и не работать сверхурочно.
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay. This weekend I plan to take a walk in the park and not work overtime.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 这就对了！适当的休息反而能让工作更有效率。
sentences.pinyin: Zhè jiù duì le! Shìdàng de xiūxi fǎn'ér néng ràng gōngzuò gèng yǒu xiàolǜ.
sentences.text_translation: Mana shunday-da! Me'yorida dam olish, aksincha, ishni yanada samaraliroq qiladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Вот это правильно! Умеренный отдых, наоборот, делает работу более эффективной.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's the way! Proper rest actually makes work more efficient.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 谢谢你！跟你聊完感觉好多了。
sentences.pinyin: Xièxie nǐ! Gēn nǐ liáo wán gǎnjué hǎo duō le.
sentences.text_translation: Rahmat senga! Sen bilan suhbatlashganimdan keyin ancha yengil tortdim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Спасибо тебе! После разговора с тобой стало намного легче.
sentences.text_translation_en: Thank you! I feel much better after talking with you.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 不客气！压力大的时候记得找人说说。
sentences.pinyin: Bú kèqi! Yālì dà de shíhou jìde zhǎo rén shuō shuo.
sentences.text_translation: Arzimaydi! Bosim kuchaygan paytda kimdir bilan gaplashishni unutma.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не за что! Когда давит стресс, не забывай с кем-нибудь поговорить.
sentences.text_translation_en: You're welcome! When the stress gets heavy, remember to talk to someone.
sentences.speaker: A
